  ✓ ADMIN_UPDATE_URL is set

  ✗ hysteria-server.service: inactive
  ✗ tuic-v5-9443.service: failed
  ✓ xray-reality-8443.service: active
  ✓ xray-trojan-2443.service: active

  ✗ HY2 :443 (udp): NOT listening
  ✗ TUIC :9443 (udp): NOT listening

  ✓ Trojan :2443 (tcp): listening
